info.name: GoMarketi API
info.description:
All requests go through the gateway at {{base_url}}. Authenticated requests need Authorization: Bearer {{access_token}} — run Auth > Login or Auth > Verify OTP first, then set the access_token collection variable from the response.

Refresh tokens are HttpOnly cookies, not JSON — Postman's cookie jar handles this automatically if you enable 'Send cookies' for this domain (Settings > General).

request.description: Returns access_token in body; sets refresh_token HttpOnly cookie.
No refresh cookie is set for staff logins.
Returns session_token (600s TTL) to pass into Verify OTP.
email/full_name only present on first sign-in; Apple never resends them.
No JSON body. Reads the refresh_token HttpOnly cookie automatically (credentials: 'include' required client-side).
No body. Clears the refresh_token cookie.
Contains raw PII — never log request bodies for this endpoint.
Always returns 204, even on a malformed body.
Returns a direct-to-R2 PUT URL; upload_url expires in 900s.
multipart/form-data, NOT JSON. file: image (jpg/jpeg/png/webp, max 5MB); type: 'logo' or 'hero'.

body.raw:
{
  "store_id": "{{store_id}}",
  "store_slug": "cobi",
  "store_name": "Cobi Auto Parts",
  "customer_name": "Ada Obi",
  "customer_email": "ada@example.com",
  "delivery_address": "12 Admiralty Way, Lekki",
  "items": [
    {
      "product_id": "{{product_id}}",
      "name": "Brake Pad Set",
      "quantity": 1,
      "price_kobo": 1500000
    }
  ],
  "payment_reference": "PSK_123456"
}
